meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Fix Unfinished Projects
content.seo_description: Stop leaving projects unfinished. Learn a high-speed client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship professional SaaS apps faster than ever.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of rigid, automated scaffolding. By integrating Antigravity for architectural structure and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you transform abstract client requirements into executable code instantly. This workflow enforces discipline, eliminates scope creep, and ensures every project reaches the deployment phase.
content.intro:
The graveyard of freelance careers is littered with half-baked MVPs and abandoned GitHub repositories. You start with high-octane motivation, only to watch your velocity collapse under the weight of manual boilerplate and shifting client demands. It is not a lack of skill; it is a failure of process.

To survive in the modern AI-driven landscape, you must decouple your cognitive load from the execution grind. By adopting an automated, agentic workflow, you stop writing code and start orchestrating systems. This is the blueprint for turning 'in progress' into 'shipped' every single time.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the project constraints and tech stack immediately to prevent scope creep. Use Antigravity to generate a robust directory structure and configuration files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready SaaS boilerplate using Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase. Implement auth-first structure and modular component architecture.

steps.title: Automated Feature Specs
steps.description: Convert client user stories into technical specifications. This ensures the implementation matches the business goal without ambiguity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the client requirements and break them down into 5 distinct, testable features. Create a task manifest for Claude Code execution.

steps.title: Iterative Implementation
steps.description: Execute the manifest using Claude Code. Focus on one module at a time to maintain high-quality output and ensure the code remains debuggable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the task manifest and prioritize the core authentication flow. Generate clean, documented code for the login and sign-up modules.

steps.title: Automated Testing Loops
steps.description: Never ship untested code. Integrate automated unit tests to verify that features work as expected before moving to the next client milestone.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive Jest test suites for the newly created authentication modules. Ensure 90% coverage for critical paths.

steps.title: Deployment and Client Handoff
steps.description: Finalize the production build and generate a deployment summary that explains the architecture to your client, adding immense professional value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a summary document highlighting key technical decisions, security measures, and deployment instructions for the client.

pro_tips: Always wrap your Claude Code interactions in a custom system prompt that enforces strict TypeScript interface adherence to avoid runtime bugs.
Use Antigravity to generate 'dry-run' architecture diagrams before writing a single line of code; it identifies architectural bottlenecks early.
Treat your CLI history as a project journal; run a script to export your Claude Code commands into a 'changelog' for the client.
Limit your context window in Claude Code by modularizing project files; large files lead to hallucinated logic.
Automate the deployment pipeline using GitHub Actions generated by Antigravity to ensure the 'shipped' state is never manual.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project with this workflow, audit your time logs to identify which module took the longest. Create a custom template in Antigravity for that specific module to reduce future development time by 50%.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your projects stall at 80% completion. Implement this professional workflow to guarantee delivery and satisfy your clients every single time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
